calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"fedcourts query|query --\" docs/cli.md | sed -n '1,240p'; UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const m = ALL_TOOLS.find(x=>x.name==="mcp__courtlistener__search"); if(!m){text("missing");exit();} const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"Kisor\" \"Guidelines commentary\" \"Stinson\"",filed_before:"2025-08-25",num_results:5,order_by:"score desc",fields:["caseName","citation","court_citation_string","dateFiled","docketNumber","absolute_url","status","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r.content??[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }
